nodes.label: Task clarity for AI use
nodes.grounding_span: For tasks, which are well defined and simple, I may outsource the entire task to the LLM

nodes.label: AI memory and context retention
nodes.label_negative: AI performance degradation and context loss
nodes.grounding_span: the models seem to be experience high-volumes and the quality drops quite a bit

nodes.label: AI as productivity multiplier for small teams
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary or inefficient for small teams
nodes.grounding_span: it is necessary to utilize AI in more tasks that I might typically, simply for the speed of implementation

nodes.label: AI impact on skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: AI as cause of skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: having the models explain and justify details, and even asking them to teach me about solutions I'm not aware of are key

nodes.label: AI simplicity and ease of use
nodes.grounding_span: the steps involved in prompt engineering can be quite complex, and repetitive

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: simply for the speed of implementation

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: the atrophy from not writing code each day is very real

nodes.label: Workflow continuity and momentum
nodes.grounding_span: to have to go from all of this context and history, to essentially need to reset and start again, is quite obnoxious and demotivating

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: For tasks, which are well defined and simple, I may outsource the entire task to the LLM and simply review the code it provides

nodes.label: Frustration with AI performance degradation
nodes.grounding_span: the models seem to be experience high-volumes and the quality drops quite a bit

nodes.label: Positive view of team AI practices for continuity
nodes.grounding_span: it is necessary to utilize AI in more tasks that I might typically, simply for the speed of implementation

nodes.label: Proactive use of AI for learning and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: having the models explain and justify details, and even asking them to teach me about solutions I'm not aware of are key

nodes.label: Positive expectation for AI improvement in difficulty differentiation
nodes.grounding_span: I believe this is likely to be improved as it becomes more of a standard workflow for developers

nodes.label: Intuition-based task decomposition
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to use my intuition on this - for example, unit tests, simple refactors, or looping logic tend to be very easy to define and implement

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to go through iterations and interrupt the model at various stages, when I find it is veering from my intended strategy
